name: What prompts should I test to see if I show up in ChatGPT?
description: Test buyer-style prompts like best, compare, pricing, and local service questions.

mainEntity.name: What prompts should I test to see if I show up in ChatGPT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use prompts that sound like real buyers, such as best provider, compare options, pricing, service area, and problem-solving questions. Track which prompts trigger competitors, because that shows you exactly where your content is weak.
acceptedAnswer.description: Test buyer-style prompts like best, compare, pricing, and local service questions.
